response.justification: The candidate's C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments over a decade ago, far short of the required 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MongoDB and MySQL are listed), and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking. The candidate's strengths lie in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and full-stack web work, which do not align with this mandate.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with senior-level roles
Strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Polyglot background including some low-level/systems work in DLang
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months) and over 10 years old, well below the 5–10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no demonstrated Windows platform development
Zero fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No financial services / capital markets domain
